question: Reanalyze terminal refreshed-center Ramsey allowing a residual-calibration shifted carrier and 13C sidebands around that shifted carrier.
axis_contract_check: ExperimentDataEachAvg readout/average axes verified by averaging per-average readouts back to ExperimentData.

synthesis.T2star_conclusion: No claim-grade numeric T2star; shifted-sideband reanalysis does not make the carrier/decay model unique enough to quote T2star.
synthesis.nearby_13C_conclusion: No supported nearby-13C claim; shifted-sideband model was checked but is not competitive/robust enough to revise the negative conclusion.
synthesis.advice_respected: Bridge-free only; no bridge queue mutation or measurement submission. Stored-average disagreement was used only as uncertainty/provenance, not as the sole rejection criterion.
synthesis.closeout_action: Keep closeout report interpretation, optionally append the shifted-sideband check.
